caption: The video begins with a dark gray screen featuring a centered, dark red play button icon. The scene then transitions to a light gray background where a circular logo appears, consisting of a red ring encircling the white number "13" and the word "kanal" written vertically in a red, stylized font. As the sequence progresses, additional text appears below the logo: the identifier "Kanal13AZ" in black text, followed by a small red YouTube icon and the phrase "abuna ol." in white text inside a red rounded rectangle. The background shifts slightly in shade from a bright off-white to a more neutral medium gray, but the logo and accompanying subscription text remain centered and stationary on the screen.
